notes: Per-sentence start/end timestamps in seconds. The player uses these to highlight the currently-spoken sentence and auto-scroll. The Nth entry corresponds to the Nth `<span data-sent="N">` inside #section-1 .prose (counted in document order across all paragraphs). If timings has fewer entries than the page has sentences, the trailing sentences will simply not highlight — that's fine. If it has more, the extras are ignored.

sentences.text: Optional: the sentence text, for verification.
Only `start` is required. `end` is optional — the player will use the next sentence's start as the end.
